text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text: Stare... A Distortion is occurring in you.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Repairs are needed. I advise swimming in the Blue
Skies at daytime and the Star Fields at nighttime.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Your Vector will reverse during such pleasure
bathing. That will eliminate the crater in your
Heart.

text_block_list.name: Neo Universe
text_block_list.text:
Neo Universe also swam today and made fine
Pulsar... Yes, I Recommend it.
